tasks.label: openx32-build
tasks.command: ./compile.sh && cp ./build/omc /var/www/html/x32/ &&  ssh root@192.168.188.104 "cd /openx32 && rm omc && wget http://192.168.188.123/x32/omc && chmod +x omc"

tasks.label: openx32-rpi
tasks.command: make -j14 && dd if=../bin/x32ctrl status=progress | ssh root@192.168.188.114 "dd of=/root/x32ctrl"

tasks.label: omc-wing
tasks.command: ./compile-wing-docker.sh && cp ./build/wing/wing-omc /var/www/html/x32/ &&  ssh root@192.168.188.105 " wget http://192.168.188.123/x32/wing-omc -O /usr/bin/wing-omc && chmod +x /usr/bin/wing-omc"
